user.title: Set up Portfolio Engine
user.description: Path is relative to your Home Assistant config directory (e.g. 'investments').

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Portfolio Engine
reconfigure.description: Change the investments folder path or update interval for this entry. Path is relative to your Home Assistant config directory.

error.investments_path_not_found: That path doesn't exist under your Home Assistant config directory.

abort.already_configured: A Portfolio Engine entry for that investments path already exists.

import_transactions.name: Import transactions
import_transactions.description: Parse a broker export file and report what it contains against a portfolio's current transaction log. Does not write to transactions.yaml automatically.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.description: The portfolio ID to import into (the folder name under your investments path).

provider.name: Provider
provider.description: Which broker export format the file is in.

file_path.name: File path
file_path.description: Path to the export file, relative to your Home Assistant config directory.

export_portfolio_data.name: Export portfolio data
export_portfolio_data.description: Write a single JSON backup file containing a portfolio's holdings, transaction history, snapshot history, and last import report.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.description: The portfolio ID to export (the folder name under your investments path).

output_path.name: Output file path
output_path.description: Where to write the backup file, relative to your Home Assistant config directory.

malformed_transaction_history.title: Portfolio Engine: invalid transaction or holdings data
malformed_transaction_history.description:
Your transactions.yaml or holdings.yaml file has invalid data and could not be loaded: {error}

Check the file for typos, missing required fields, or invalid values (e.g. negative shares), then reload the integration.

reconciliation_discrepancy.title: Portfolio Engine: reconciliation discrepancy
reconciliation_discrepancy.description:
Your declared holdings/cash balance don't match what your transaction log implies ({count} discrepancy(ies) found). Check the Reconciliation entity's attributes for details, and compare your holdings.yaml against your actual transaction history.

This does not affect your other portfolio figures - it's a data-integrity check, not an error in your portfolio value.

missing_fx_rates.title: Portfolio Engine: missing exchange rates
missing_fx_rates.description:
Could not fetch a current exchange rate for: {currencies}. Affected positions are using a 1:1 fallback rate, which will be inaccurate until the rate becomes available again.

This is usually temporary (a provider outage or rate limit) and resolves on its own within a few update cycles.

snapshot_repository_unavailable.title: Portfolio Engine: snapshot storage unavailable
snapshot_repository_unavailable.description:
Could not read or write portfolio snapshot history: {error}

Your current prices and positions are unaffected, but historical performance metrics (time-weighted return, volatility, drawdown) may be missing or incomplete until this resolves. This usually indicates a Home Assistant storage issue - check available disk space and the Home Assistant logs.
